checks.details: Account balance aggregation uses BigDecimal. Interest calculations match COBOL precision. Statement generation totals verified
Batch account processing maintains referential integrity. Account status transitions validated. Cross-reference with card and transaction records verified
Service account authentication. PII handling compliant — account numbers masked in logs
Account file processing matches COBOL sequential read pattern. Report generation output matches COBOL WRITE AFTER ADVANCING format
Batch job — no REST API. Triggered via Quarkus @Scheduled annotation
Batch processor pattern. Javadoc references CBACT01C.cbl. 90% line coverage
